title: nil
subtitle: nil is a singleton object that is used as a placeholder and to mean false in Io.

members.name: catch
members.description: Does nothing, returns nil. See <tt>Exception catch</tt>.

members.name: clone
members.description: returns self since nil is a singleton.

members.name: justSerialized
members.description: Writes the receiver's code into the stream.

members.name: or
members.description: Returns anObject if anObject is not nil. Otherwise returns nil.

members.name: pass
members.description: Does nothing, returns nil. See <tt>Exception pass</tt>.
